title: Implement v5.0 Skillful Actor Runtime
description: Build the next AOF runtime frontier where actors are assigned with explicit skill packets, capability fit, resource access, policy constraints, expected output contracts, and negative benchmark coverage. This should make individual LLM actors perform above their raw baseline by giving them the right role, skill, context, resources, constraints, and review path, while preserving the Human Recognition Interface as the operator surface.
triage_notes: Parent v5.0 theme decomposed into TASK-049 through TASK-054. TASK-048 is not the immediate implementation step; TASK-049 is prioritized first. Close TASK-048 only after the contract, writer, assignment evaluation, resource/policy gate, negative benchmarks, HRI projection, and self-hosting proof are complete.
